archive_rules.canonical_rule: Stable top-level ops/reports/*.json filenames are current operational artifacts.
archive_rules.archive_rule: Dated one-off top-level ops reports should move to ops/reports/archive after superseded.

archive_rules.canonical_rule: The private reference manifest stays current as release provenance; root narrative external reports stay current only when they carry unique unresolved action themes.
archive_rules.archive_rule: Root narrative external reports become archive candidates when their structured action themes are implemented, explicitly superseded, or fully covered by a broader active report.

archive_rules.canonical_rule: Stable top-level ops/operator files are current operator-only artifacts.
archive_rules.archive_rule: Dated one-off top-level operator reports should move to ops/operator/archive after superseded.

archive_rules.canonical_rule: promotion-report.history.status is the canonical active/archived/quarantined state.
archive_rules.archive_rule: Archived run directories may move under runs/archive without changing run state.

tracking_policy.commit_policy: Track decision-grade canonical_report artifacts in stable top-level namespaces; move superseded archive artifacts to archive namespaces; keep ephemeral run-local or dry-run outputs out of stable commit surfaces unless promoted by a schema-backed writer.
decision_grade_surfaces: external-reports private reference manifest and active review reports

now: 0 archive candidate(s) remain in active namespaces.
next: No archive hygiene action is currently recommended.
